boxDescription: This fuse block is located in the engine compartment, on top of the windshield washer fluid reservoir. See “Engine Compartment Overview” in the Index for more information on location. The fuses marked spare are available if a replacement fuse is needed. To remove the cover, press the two tabs in and lift up the cover.
